top_signals.title: Japanese bond yields march toward 3% as fiscal fears escalate
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin, XRP draw Japanese firms as weak yen drives treasury diversification
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Amazon raising at least $25 billion in bond sale, won't issue more debt in 2026
top_signals.summary: It marks Amazon's latest debt raise as it looks to buttress its massive investments in artificial intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin nears cycle bottom as over half of supply is held at a loss, says K33
top_signals.summary: K33 said Bitcoin has historically bottomed within weeks of more than half of its circulating supply being held at a loss, with strong one-year returns following in most previous cycles.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Billionaires John and Laura Arnold commit $2.6 million to study online sports betting risk
top_signals.summary: John Arnold and Laura Arnold, who run Arnold Ventures, are investing $2.6 million for university research into potential harms of online sports betting.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Transportation pricing index hovers near all-time high in June
top_signals.summary:
Tightness across the truckload market eased only slightly in June.

The post Transportation pricing index hovers near all-time high in June appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Commission registers European Citizens' Initiative calling for unconditional basic income
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 07 Jul 2026 Today, the European Commission registered a European citizens' initiative (ECI), entitled ‘Introduction of Unconditional Basic Income (UBI) throughout the EU'.

top_signals.title: Microsoft testing new Cloud Rebuild Windows 11 recovery feature
top_signals.summary: Microsoft has begun testing the Cloud Rebuild recovery feature in the latest Windows 11 Insider Preview builds released for users in the Experimental channel. [...]
